visualizations.title: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic
visualizations.description: Every composite number can be uniquely expressed as a product of prime powers.

steps.explanation: Distinct Prime Factors: The unique prime numbers that divide N.
Exponents: The number of times each prime factor is multiplied.

visualizations.title: Growing a Factor Tree for 24
visualizations.description: Watch the factor tree grow branch-by-branch, decomposing 24 into circled prime leaves: 2, 2, 2, and 3.
